verdict: Purchases are carrying the account; lead capture is broken and call follow-up is leaking pipeline.
diagnosis: Spend of $1,417 produced only 2 leads this period at $12 each, while 9 purchases drove $5,897 in revenue.

signals.headline: Only 2 leads from $1,417 spend
signals.detail: Lead volume is critically low this period despite 17,642 impressions and 901 clicks reaching the audience.

signals.headline: 9 purchases generated $5,897 revenue
signals.detail: Sales are the real engine here, averaging $655 per order and far outperforming lead generation.

signals.headline: 423 landing page views, 22 add-to-carts
signals.detail: Only 5% of page viewers added to cart this period, signaling a product page or offer problem.

signals.headline: 66 unread conversations sitting open
signals.detail: Inbound messages are piling up unanswered. Each one is a warm buyer being ignored.

signals.headline: 1 call click, 64 direction requests
signals.detail: Google Business Profile is driving foot traffic interest but almost zero phone calls this period.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.subheader: Your cost per lead beats industry averages
benchmark.body: Healthcare cost per lead in 2026 runs from $56 for urgent care to over $600 for cosmetic surgery. Your $12 per lead is far below the typical paid search range of $120 to $200.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.subheader: Summer concern peak for senior safety
seasonal.body: Adult children research medical alert devices most heavily when visiting aging parents. Summer travel season drives a measurable lift in purchase intent for fall detection and GPS-enabled wearables.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.body: Bay Alarm Medical, Medical Guardian, and Apple Watch dominate 2026 rankings. Seniors are substituting smartwatches for traditional pendants, and purchase intent among adult children dropped from 39% to 22% since 2023.

recommendations.title: Clear the 66 unread conversations this week
recommendations.detail: Warm inbound messages are the highest-intent leads you have. Consider assigning one person to reply within an hour during business hours.

recommendations.title: Test a stronger offer on the Belle Watch landing page
recommendations.detail: Add-to-cart is converting at only 5% of page views. Worth testing free shipping, a bundled fall detection trial, or a family-buyer message.

recommendations.title: Shift budget toward purchase-driving keywords
recommendations.detail: Purchases returned roughly $4 per $1 spent this period. Consider pulling spend from broad lead terms and doubling down on "life alert" buyer intent.
